ch-1: Welcome to the Desert Menagerie, traveler. Here, the sands hold the whispers of ancient animals (حيوانات - ḥayawānāt) that once roamed the palace gardens. Prove your worth by learning their names, and my cage will crack.
ch-2: You have entered the realm of the Sorcerer's Family. To break my curse, you must understand the bloodlines and family (عائلة - ʿāʾila) of Marid who guards my lamp. Master these bonds, and our freedom draws near.
ch-3: Ah, the Feast Before the Curse... I can still smell the rich spices and taste the sweet food (طعام - ṭaʿām) from my last night of freedom. Learn what we ate, and let us feast on knowledge together.
ch-4: Look closely at these magical runes, the Colors of the Lamp. Each glowing hue and color (لون - lawn) is a lock forged by Marid's dark magic. Decode them with me, and we shall shatter this prison.
ch-5: Behold the ruins of the Kingdom of Al-Rashid. Every stone and street in this ancient place (مكان - makān) echoes with forgotten glory. Walk these paths, learn their names, and we will finally escape.
